# Southwest Recipe Photo Slots

These images support the Southwest regional cuisine launch across Arizona, New Mexico, Texas, Oklahoma, and Kids Korner activities.

## Style

- Warm editorial food photography with natural light.
- Food should be identifiable before reading the recipe title.
- Southwest visual language can include cast iron, adobe warmth, woven textiles, turquoise accents, fresh peppers, rustic kitchens, and desert-table color.
- No watermarks, text overlays, faces, hands, costumes, or stock-style stereotypes.
